---
title: "TODO: Thesis Title"
---

This site has two halves. The **thesis** is the prose in
[Background](chapters/01-background/index.qmd),
[Methods](chapters/02-methods/index.qmd),
[Operations](chapters/03-operation/index.qmd), and
[Future Work](chapters/CH-04-future-work.qmd) — that's what gets bound.
The rest of the site is the **project-management surface** the thesis
runs on: a top-level Gantt, the initiative board below, a weekly-update
log, and an archive of source material.

> TODO: replace this paragraph with the abstract once the thesis is
> drafted.

## Project schedule

Top-level Gantt covering the work categories the advisor tracks. The
Mermaid block below is the single source of truth for the schedule.
Edit this block when the schedule changes; the per-WU frozen PNGs
(`updates/WU-*/media/gantt.png`) regenerate automatically from it via
`scripts/render/build_gantt.py`. Add a bar here whenever you scaffold
a new epic (`.\thesis.ps1 new epic …`).

```{mermaid}
gantt
    title TODO Thesis schedule
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat %b
    tickInterval 1month

    section A. Research
    Example Epic                  :active, a1, 2026-06-01, 2026-07-15

    section B. Thesis writing
    Chapter drafts                :        b1, 2026-07-01, 42d
    Thesis Draft Target Deadline  :milestone, b2, 2026-10-01, 1d
    Thesis Submission Deadline    :milestone, b3, 2026-11-09, 1d
```

## Initiative board

The Gantt's bars are *epics*. Each epic has a README under
[`initiatives/`](initiatives/index.qmd) with a customer/need/benefit
brief, related-epics graph, and an items listing. Everything below is
generated from README front matter by `scripts/render/build_board.py`
(a pre-render hook) — edit the front matter, never these tables.
Schedule emphasis (crit bars) lives in the Mermaid Gantt above.

{{< include _board.md >}}

## Where to go from here

- **Reading the thesis** — start with
  [Background](chapters/01-background/index.qmd) and use the sidebar.
- **Reviewing weekly progress** — see the
  [weekly updates](updates/index.qmd) appendix (newest first).
- **Browsing the project tree** — see the
  [initiatives](initiatives/index.qmd) appendix; each initiative lists
  its epics, each epic lists its items + status log.
- **Looking up source material** — see the [archive](archive/index.qmd)
  appendix, with an [external index](archive/external-index.qmd) for
  files too large to carry in git.
